title: NoDurabilityLost
description: Axe does not take damage when destroying leaves
body: Tired of switching tools to not waste them? This mod prevents tools from taking damage when they are used for the wrong blocks. Meaning a pickaxe will not loose durability when you mine dirt, axe will not loose durability when destroying leaves. ![Showing axe destroying leaves without using durability](https://i.imgur.com/O1xTW8x.gif) [ ](https://bisecthosting.com/teamcreative) Use the promo code teamcreative to get 25% off the first month on any of the gaming servers! [](https://www.patreon.com/creativemd)
